allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card progress dialog collapsible badge select input popover separator tooltip sheet table dropdown-menu checkbox command -y)

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\)\); const types = JSON.parse\(data[0].text\).types; // Unescape process.stdout.write\(types\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\)\); const types = JSON.parse\(data[0].text\).types; process.stdout.write\(types\); }\); ")
